_note: LEGACY/REFUTED DEATH-WRITE PROBE (any target) - HP=0 + KO FLAG. Same as death-test-anytarget.json but CauseDeathOnZeroHp=true, setting +0x61|=0x20 after HP=0. Live evidence proved this still creates a zombie/partial state, not real KO. Keep only for historical auditing; current custom-formula profiles use MinHpFloor=1 and let the engine own death.

DeathStateWrites.Name: KO-0x61-bit0x20
DeathStateWrites._mask_hex: 0x20 = 32 dec (set on every death in Test 2a)
